description: A high-level plan outlining the balance between adopting new technologies and maintaining stability. Defines criteria for selecting technologies, integration timelines, and risk mitigation for innovation.

description: A blueprint for the open-world environment, balancing scope, performance, and player immersion. Specifies urban/rural ratios, environmental diversity, and technical constraints.

description: Guidelines for balancing AI-assisted generation with handcrafted content. Includes quality standards, aesthetic parameters, and curation workflows.

Create risk mitigation plans for funding gaps

description: A guideline for implementing ethical decision systems. Defines narrative complexity, player agency, and cultural sensitivity requirements.
